## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? Link to the issue it resolves. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes existing behavior — describe in detail below)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] New detector / integration / skill

## Testing

- [ ] Added / updated tests for all changed behavior
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (zero deps, strict TS, no AI in detectors)
- [ ] I have added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
